stdout_tail: - The repo already had the right reusable primitive for this feature: `MaintenanceJobHandle` in `crates/membrain-core/src/engine/maintenance.rs`.
- Dream-related health fields were already present in `crates/membrain-core/src/health.rs`, which made this scheduler slice a good bounded follow-on.

- `crates/membrain-cli/src/main.rs` had a preexisting mismatch where `Commands::Health` used `output.brief` without `brief` existing in `SharedOutputFlags`; fixing that was necessary to get verification green.
- Registered with MCP Agent Mail as `LavenderCrane`
